text:
is a Shinkalion Z appearing in episode 21 of Shinkansen Henkei Robo Shinkalion Z TV animation series.

Profile

Shinkalion Z 500 TYPE EVA is a bipedal robot whose body is composed of different parts of the 500 TYPE EVA train that is similar to Evangelion Unit-01. There are several characteristic elements of the Evangelion, like the helmet and "collar" of Unit-01. The colors of Unit-01: purple and green with black details are also present.

Shinkalion Z 500 TYPE EVA is 26.5 meters high and weighs 110 tons. It is formed by more than four wagons. Like Unit-01, Shinkalion Z 500 TYPE EVA is able to generate an A.T. Field in addition to handling many weapons such as Progressive Signal Knife.
